summary: First-finish smoke test of Vyapar AI. Backend: 8 core endpoints validated (dashboard/stats, products, orders, customers, activities, analytics, suggestions, ai/command, billing/invoice) all return 200 with correct data and no _id leakage. AI command 'show todays sales' returns Today's Snapshot; 'Blue Star Bag sold' correctly decrements stock 12->11 with before/after payload. Billing invoice POST creates order #1003 and completes flow. Frontend: dashboard loads with 'Good evening, Jay', all 5 stat cards render, command bar + 7 suggested prompt chips + smart suggestions + activity timeline all present. AI response panel appears with 'Today's Snapshot' after Enter. Sidebar navigation works for Products (8 cards), Orders (Arjun Mehta pending), Billing (search present), Customers (grid present), Analytics (revenue chart present). Watch 90s Demo button opens demo-mode-overlay. No JS console errors detected.
passed: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns sales_today, revenue_today, orders_total, products, low_stock
GET /api/products returns 8 seeded products with id (no _id)
GET /api/orders returns 1 pending order for Arjun Mehta
GET /api/analytics returns revenue_series, best_sellers, by_category, low_stock
GET /api/suggestions returns low-stock and pending-order suggestions
POST /api/ai/command 'show todays sales' -> intent=show_stats, title='Today's Snapshot'
POST /api/ai/command 'Blue Star Bag sold' -> intent=product_sold, stock 12->11 decremented
Dashboard renders greeting 'Good evening, Jay' and all 5 stat cards
Command bar submit displays ai-response-panel with correct snapshot
Products page shows 8 product cards; Orders shows Arjun Mehta; Analytics shows revenue-chart
No .error class messages on any page

failed.issue: Review spec mentions 'stat-orders-total' but actual code uses testid 'stat-orders' for the Total orders card
failed.evidence: Dashboard.jsx line 69: testId="stat-orders". Card renders correctly with value 3.

action_items: Optional: align testid to 'stat-orders-total' if external test scripts depend on the exact name in the spec. Functionality is unaffected.
notes: Add-product upload flow (Emergent LLM call to Claude Sonnet 4.5) and demo-start scripted sequence were NOT executed in this smoke pass to keep latency low; recommend covering in full testing agent. Base64 image storage is intentional simplification per problem statement.
